Description:
<UIForeground>08</UIForeground><UIGlow>04</UIGlow>■How to Enter<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

Speak to Drivingway in Bestways Burrow to reach Sinus Ardorum.

Upon arrival, you can travel between instances by speaking to Drivingway again.

<UIForeground>08</UIForeground><UIGlow>04</UIGlow>■Accessing Exploration Zones<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

Speak to Drivingway in Bestways Burrow to reach Sinus Ardorum─and subsequent stars, once the initiative is ready to make the hop.

Alternatively, you can travel to the latest accessible planet via the Bestways Burrow aetheryte.
